problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
